title: glyceria striata f. stricta
intro: Glyceria striata f. stricta, also known as upright mann grass or strict mann grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Glyceria striata f. stricta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
